data.name: Multi-Agent Legal Risk Review System for Contract Escalation
data.description: ContractSentinel is a LegalTech AI system that models contract review as a policy-driven reasoning workflow rather than a simple chatbot or summarization tool. The system parses contracts into a graph-aware legal structure, runs a multi-agent reasoning pipeline, and produces a structured risk memo with evidence chains to support human legal review. The goal is not to replace lawyers, but to help them identify risk, justify findings, and decide when escalation is required.

data.name: Interactive Novel AI Platform
data.description: An AI-powered content platform that enables anyone to easily rewrite and continue novels. Through a Context Memory Engine for narrative coherence and an Intelligent Hint Recommendation Algorithm to lower the creative barrier, we deliver an immersive "IF-Line" interactive storytelling experience.

data.name: Voice-capable mission assistant for NASA
data.description: A deterministic, safety-oriented EVA-style copilot demo: typed or spoken commands, mock suit telemetry, YAML procedures, guardrails, and a React mission console. No LLM and no cloud speech APIs — local Whisper for speech-to-text and the browser's Web Speech API for read-aloud replies.

data.name: Multi-Agent Quantitative Trading System on Stellar Blockchain
data.description: AI-powered multi-agent quantitative trading platform that combines GPT-4o AI agents with Stellar Soroban smart contracts for transparent, secure portfolio management. Three specialized agents (Trading, Risk, Payment) execute 10 strategies while a custom Rust contract enforces risk limits on-chain.

data.name: Enterprise Knowledge RAG System
data.description: An AI-powered document question-answering system that allows users to upload enterprise documents, and interactively ask questions based on their content. Users can upload one or more PDF documents and ask natural-language questions. Built with Streamlit, LangChain, FAISS, and OpenAI models.

data.name: Agentic AI Sales Automation System
data.description: A comprehensive sales automation platform built for the IBM watsonx Orchestrate Hackathon. It uses a multi-agent AI system to automatically process sales meeting transcripts, extract key information, update CRM systems, and generate follow-up communications.
